loop_goal: Keep rescoring the fully promoted next-version baseline and route the next bounded expansion slice through the same governed portfolio loop.

active_workers.current_task: Collected repeated feedback on truthfulness gaps and preserved the blocked-promotion evidence in the review queue.
Routed the weakest score-bearing slice into the current hardening cycle instead of broadening scope prematurely.
Prepare the next bounded expansion choice now that the current named baseline is fully promoted.

review_gate.exit_condition: The proposed fix must directly address the observed PM communication and planning pain.

validation_gate.exit_condition: Frozen eval results, decision-memory evidence, and score-bearing control-surface claims must agree before the loop can call the baseline healthy.

pm_decision_gate.exit_condition: The PM should defer stable promotion while frozen eval regressions or mixed-provenance control-surface claims remain visible.

next_recommended_action: Refresh the portfolio after the next dogfood window and use it to choose the next bounded expansion slice.
